business.name: Modern Coastal LLC - Landscaping & Lawn Care Service
business.tagline: Family-owned landscaping that grows with you

hero.headline: From *push mower* to full crews — we earned your trust
hero.subheadline: Noah and his family have been turning Wilmington yards around since day one. Next-day estimates, same-week service.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Everything your yard needs
services_section.subheading: From cleanup to ongoing care — we handle it all

services.title: Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Custom landscape design services featuring native coastal plants, hardscaping, and outdoor living spaces that thrive in Wilmington's coastal climate.

services.title: Weekly Lawn Maintenance
services.description: Professional mowing, edging, trimming, and blowing services to keep your lawn pristine year-round with flexible scheduling options.

services.title: Irrigation System Services
services.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance of sprinkler systems designed to efficiently water your landscape while conserving water.

services.title: Seasonal Cleanup & Pruning
services.description: Spring and fall cleanup services including leaf removal, plant pruning, mulching, and preparation for seasonal transitions.

services.title: Hardscape Construction
services.description: Professional installation of patios, walkways, retaining walls, and outdoor features using quality materials suited for coastal environments.

about.heading: Started with a push mower, built on relationships
about.body: Noah began Modern Coastal with just a push mower and a commitment to doing right by Wilmington neighbors. Years later, we're a full team but still family-owned, still personal, and still willing to do those extras that make the difference. Patrick and the whole family are hands-on with every job.

reviews.name: Jessica S.
reviews.text: This family-owned company came out on short notice and did incredible work — tree removal, bush trimming, complete cleanup. Super friendly and efficient.

reviews.name: Allison C.
reviews.text: Noah and team were on time, did a great job, and provided excellent service overall. Highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Audrey K.
reviews.text: As a new homeowner I was hesitant, but Patrick and his family are wonderful to work with. They did a full spring cleaning and were very personable.

reviews.name: Brenda M.
reviews.text: I've watched Noah grow from a push mower to a professional company over the years. Always reliable and willing to do the extras I ask for.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Cape Fear region
service_areas.subheading: Professional landscaping throughout the Wilmington area

cta.heading: Ready to transform your yard?
cta.body: Get your free estimate from the family-owned team that's been earning trust one yard at a time.
